core_payload.content:
# N1Hub Intelligence Fabric

## 1. Role
N1Hub Intelligence Fabric owns the deep cognition lanes that dig, refine, and reason over graph state. It keeps mining, candidate refinement, and swarm reasoning together so the system can convert raw signal into structured memory without scattering those lanes across unrelated parent hubs.

## 2. Intelligence Fabric Surface
This sub-hub groups `deepmine`, `a2c`, and `n-infinity`. Together they define how N1Hub discovers raw ore, refines that ore into admissible candidates, and applies swarm reasoning to graph structure, contradiction pressure, and maintenance opportunity.

## 3. Operating Boundary
This sub-hub does not own chat ingress, control posture, day-and-night daemon law, or product program routing. Those responsibilities belong to `operator-surfaces`, `runtime-coordination`, and `program-lines`.

neuro_concentrate.summary: N1Hub Intelligence Fabric groups the deep cognition lanes of the habitat: DeepMine, A2C, and N-Infinity. It keeps mining, refinery work, and swarm reasoning together so raw signal, candidate construction, and graph-aware intelligence form one visible substrate instead of a scattered set of adjacent systems. This boundary matters because N1Hub needs a clear seam between how intelligence is produced and how operator surfaces, runtime coordination, and program lines consume that intelligence.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Minted during Dream N1Hub decomposition to isolate mining, refinement, and swarm reasoning from operator surfaces, daemon coordination, and program lines.
